meaning: n.撒马利亚人,撒马利亚人的
examples: A good Samaritan offered us a room in his house.
Residents are hunting for the good Samaritan behind a series of incidents, so they can thank him or her for the continuous donation.
"I have to listen to what the Good Samaritan Hospital doctor tells me, " said Annie.
Samaritan's Purse will be organizing teams to help with debris clean up throughout the East Coast.
